pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the generic Spring Boot starter with the Web starter to enable HTTP server capabilities.
Add Spring Data JPA starter for database persistence support.
Add MySQL Connector dependency for runtime database connectivity.
Add Springdoc OpenAPI UI dependency for Swagger documentation.
Add Spring Security starter for authentication and authorization.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing secured endpoints.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to explicitly target Java 21 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the compiler might not enforce Java 21 specific bytecode generation or might rely on default settings that differ from the intended target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven Resources Plugin to ensure UTF-8 encoding for resources.

src/main/java/com/letocart/java_apirest_.general_idea: Add a RestTemplate bean definition to the Spring Boot application configuration.
